methodology: Critical path = all tile→grout→cure→caulk→cure for pools, steam, changerooms. Parallel = mechanical/features/dry changeroom work in cure windows.

tasks.title: Shutdown kickoff + safety / lockout coordination
tasks.description: Brief crews on LOTO, chemical handling, and wet-area sequencing. REF:G-SAFETY

tasks.title: Facility-wide inspection: tiles, joints, fixtures, wet seals
tasks.description: Document failures; photo log for rework avoidance next shutdown. Drives all demo scopes. REF:G-INSP-ALL

tasks.title: Pools: remove failed grout, caulking, and damaged tile (all vessels)
tasks.description: Prep all pool shells for tile repair wave. REF:G-DEMO-POOLS
tasks.area: Lap Pool; Leisure Pool; Swirl Pool

tasks.title: Steam room: remove failed grout/caulk and damaged tile
tasks.description: Includes inlet-adjacent failures called out in master list. REF:SR-DEMO

tasks.title: Steam room: tile repair (walls/floor, steam inlet zone)
tasks.description: Repair broken pieces under steam inlet per shutdown list. REF:SR-TILE

tasks.title: Steam room: grout walls and floors
tasks.description: Starts after tile repair + 1d cure buffer (scheduled). REF:SR-GROUT

tasks.title: Steam room: grout cure hold (min 2d before caulk / paint exposure)
Steam room: caulking / perimeter seals after grout cure
Steam room: sealant cure before heavy cleaning / recommission
tasks.description: 1–2d lag before final wet scrub counts as complete. REF:SR-LAG-CAULK

tasks.title: Steam room: scrub walls and floors (non-destructive)
tasks.description: Parallel where safe; finish quality before final disinfection. REF:SR-SCRUB

tasks.title: Steam generator: drain, clean, flush, replace sensors
tasks.description: Mechanical lane during cure windows. REF:SR-GEN-SVC

tasks.title: Steam generator: remove and clean cover
Steam room: full clean + disinfection
tasks.description: After sealant cure and generator service lane complete. REF:SR-FINAL-CLEAN

tasks.title: Family Changeroom: remove failed grout/caulk and damaged tile
Family Changeroom: tile repair
Family Changeroom: grout tile
tasks.description: Starts after tile repair + 1d buffer. REF:FCR-GROUT

tasks.title: Family Changeroom: grout cure hold (min 2d) before caulk / paint
Family Changeroom: caulking / wet-area perimeter seals
Family Changeroom: sealant cure before grate reinstall / heavy use
Family Changeroom: scrub floors
Family Changeroom: powerwash or scrub walls
Family Changeroom: dust vents, locker tops, partitions, lights, ceilings
Family Changeroom: inspect / repair locker mechanisms
Family Changeroom: inspect toilets, sinks, showers (leaks / damage)
Family Changeroom: paint partitions, walls, ceilings
tasks.description: Only after grout cure hold completes (moisture rule). REF:FCR-PAINT

tasks.title: Family Changeroom: inspect and clean grates
tasks.description: After caulk cure where grates interface wet seals. REF:FCR-GRATES

tasks.title: Family Changeroom: polish stainless steel
Family Changeroom: change light tubes or ballasts (as needed)
Family Changeroom: check rubber seals on doors
Family Changeroom: check door hardware
Family Changeroom: inspect partitions for structural damage / movement
Family Changeroom: remove and clean shower heads
Family Changeroom: clean / repair shower buttons
Family Changeroom: full clean + disinfection
tasks.description: Closeout after paint / hardware / grate lane. REF:FCR-FINAL-CLEAN

tasks.title: Lap pool: charge filters, clean cells, repair chlorinator boards
Diving board: scrub, bleach or repaint; inspect bolts; polish stainless
Pipe falls: inspect/replace anodes; remove rust and repaint
Climbing wall: powerwash, scrub grips, inspect hardware
Leisure pool kids features: function test, rust/repaint, bleach teacup, clean, purge airlines
Diving blocks: inspect hardware/damage; degrease, scrub, disinfect
Mechanical: steam system checks tied to generator service window
tasks.description: Cross-coord with steam generator tasks. REF:MECH-STEAM-FEED

tasks.title: Mechanical: filters, chlorinator, jets, drains, lights (facility-wide pass)
tasks.description: Fills cure windows with crew efficiency. REF:MECH-FILTERS-GLOBAL

tasks.title: Reinstall pool grates / covers after caulk cure (all vessels)
tasks.description: Depends on last vessel caulk-cure tasks. REF:G-REINSTALL-GRATES

tasks.title: Reinstall fixtures / hardware checks (wet decks)
System startup + water balance + disinfection verification
